name: Change Record (manual)
about: Manually record an out-of-band or emergency change not captured by a PR

labels: change-record
assignees: ""
---

## Change Details

**Date / time (UTC):**
**Performed by:**
**Change type:** standard / normal / emergency
**Risk level:** low / medium / high

**PR / commit reference:** *(if applicable)*

---

<!-- What was changed? -->

<!-- Why was this change made out-of-band? -->

## Impact

**Affected services:**
**Downtime:** none / <duration>

## Rollback

<!-- Was rollback required? If yes, describe. -->

## Post-Change Verification

- [ ] Services healthy after change
- [ ] ArgoCD state consistent with actual state
- [ ] No regression identified
